channel.title: Culture Resilience lab
channel.description: Recent content on Culture Resilience lab

item.title: Example Project
item.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec accumsan dapibus purus, vel maximus erat facilisis vel. Suspendisse eu ipsum consequat, sodales nulla vel, faucibus velit. Fusce imperdiet lacus nec cursus auctor. In vulputate arcu et nulla placerat, nec pulvinar quam rhoncus. Praesent vel placerat nunc. Mauris elit felis, pulvinar egestas risus ut, fermentum ullamcorper orci. Integer tempor, neque sed fermentum eleifend, ligula est tincidunt purus, sodales semper elit enim ut mi.

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: Rich Content
item.description: Hugo ships with several Built-in Shortcodes for rich content, along with a Privacy Config and a set of Simple Shortcodes that enable static and no-JS versions of various social media embeds.

item.title: Placeholder Text
item.description: Lorem est tota propiore conpellat pectoribus de pectora summo.

item.title: Math Typesetting
item.description: Mathematical notation in a Hugo project can be enabled by using third party JavaScript libraries.

item.title: Emoji Support
item.description: Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.

item.title: Exploring digital interuentions in transmitting traditional lantern making
Exploring Digital interventions in Traditional Chinese Puppetry
item.description: Traditional puppetry, Interactive design, Traditional Performing Arts

item.title: Robots in Underwater Archaeology
item.description: Dancing with three types of haptic feedback Yating Pan

item.title: Survey on Teenagers' Sustainability Literacy and Individual Behaviors
item.description: Teenagers, Sustainability Literacy, Individual Behaviors, Survey 2

item.title: Contact
item.description: To contact us, please fill out the form below.

item.title: Publications
item.description: Fan, Y., Zhang, W. * (2024) Innovation within Tradition: Exploring Digital Interventions in Transmitting Traditional Lantern Making. In 2024 International Conference on Culture-Oriented Science & Technology (ICCST) (pp.179-184). IEEE. DOI: https://doi.org/10.1109/CoST64302.2024.00043. Du, Y. & Zhang, W.* (2024) Exploring the Potential of Design in Early Childhood Education for Sustainability. In: Lindgren, R., Asino, T. I., Kyza, E. A., Looi, C. K., Keifert, D. T., & Suárez, E. (Eds.). Proceedings of the 18th International Conference of the Learning Sciences- ICLS 2024.

item.title: Team
item.description: About us Design for Resilient Culture Research Group The Design for Resilient Culture Research Group (DRC) is part of the School of Design at Southern University of Science and Technology in Shenzhen, China. This research group is led by Dr. Wanlin ZHANG, who is a design researcher and design educator on culturally significant design, design for sustainability, and digital humanities. Our research group focuses on cultural practices that have been handed down from generations to generations, such as craft, music, song, dance, and theater.
